ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF DANIEL JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302: PLAINTIFF DANIEL JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGING IN THE PROPER FORM ONE OR MORE CLAIMS BASED ON FEDERAL OR CALIFORNIA DISABILITY LAWS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Daniel Johnson telephone number 415-691-1685 in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DANIEL JOHNSON'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is granted. Plaintiff is given thirty days leave to file an amended complaint alleging in the proper form one or more claims based on federal or California disability laws. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dan Johnson telephone number 415-691-1685 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Erin Kuka of Office of The City Attorney telephone number 415-554-4229 for Defendant.

The issue of service was argued. In re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, the Court will review the proposed order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
